ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock index (e.g., NIFTY) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock index at the given time */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock index during the time frame */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock index during the time frame */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock index at the given time */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during that minute */,
  "indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator for special market events or alerts (0 for none, 1 for alert) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the entry */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for currency conversion */,
  "volume_weighted_avg_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry associated with the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy or sell) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade execution */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Exact time the trade was executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Actual price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, price surge) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered or is responsible for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the trading strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time the strategy was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom report */,
  "report_query" TEXT /* SQL query for the custom report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time the report was created */,
  "last_run_at" TEXT /* Time the report was last run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
